reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) skill to improve accuracy and reasoning for future questions. This will spend my current Skill Point, but I am only 1 XP away from earning another one.
Unlocking pe_plan provides a planning block and an additional reflection call after answering, which is vital for maintaining high HP and ensuring correct answers in higher-level chambers.

I am prioritizing accuracy for higher-level challenges. Unlocking the Reflection skill allows for a dedicated self-correction step, which is vital for Level 3 questions and future Double Down attempts. This will use my 1 available Skill Point.
